ogTitle: Kulin West vs Kumarina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kulin West and Kumarina.
heading: Kulin West vs Kumarina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kulin West, Western Australia and Kumarina, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kumarina has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kulin West (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kulin West or Kumarina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kulin West has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Kumarina scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kulin West scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Kumarina scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kulin West or Kumarina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kumarina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
